utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding sections. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: 1) health_coverage: explicitly includes physical and mental health insurance with named plans and costs — fully specified. 2) property_coverage: home/contents insurance with a plan name and cost — fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: travel insurance with a plan name and cost — fully specified. 4) additional_services: includes enhancement services with plan names and costs — fully specified. 5) total_budget: includes complete monthly and annual cost breakdown — fully specified. Therefore, all 5/5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Extract plan items from the final coverage plan and match them to identically named options in the ground-truth ratings. The items present are: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health), InsurePlus Standard Plan (mental health), InsurePlus Standard Coverage (property), PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel), Telemedicine Services, Premium Medical Network, and 24/7 Travel Assistance. Look up each item's rating in the corresponding ground-truth sections.
